# Copilot Instructions

## Project Overview

AI video editing workflow for **DJI Osmo Action 4** footage processed in the cloud using **Azure Content Understanding** (Azure AI). The goal is to automate ingestion, analysis, and editing of action-camera video via Azure services.

## Architecture

> _This section will grow as code is added. Update it when major components are introduced._

Key Azure services in scope:
- **Azure Content Understanding** – video/audio analysis (transcription, scene detection, highlights)
- Additional Azure services (storage, compute, messaging) to be documented here
